name: parspec-design
description: Parspec brand stack — three composable Claude Code skills that compile a single brand SSoT (design-model.yaml) into Parspec-branded slides, ICP-credible craft rules, and per-surface generation. Built for Construction Materials Distributors.

plugins.name: parspec-design
plugins.description: Brand SSoT skill. Maintains Parspec design-model.yaml (colors, typography, motion, voice) and generates bundled previews. Versioned via YAML frontmatter and git tags so brand evolution is mechanical, not manual.

plugins.name: parspec-slides
plugins.description: Slide generation skill. Reads design-model.yaml from parspec-design and emits zero-dependency HTML decks with Parspec brand applied. Forked from zarazhangrui/frontend-slides — preserves viewport invariants, density limits, PPT/PDF/Vercel pipeline.

plugins.name: parspec-craft
plugins.description: Craft rules skill. Universal anti-AI-slop, color, typography rules + data-driven palette enforcement that reads avoid/primary_axis_preserved/typography from design-model.yaml. Lints any HTML against active brand version.
